content:
1. Converts temps between C/F/K (via Celsius) + rounds to 2dp; exists for weather-service unit conversion. Only errors on sub-0K Kelvin output.
2. Absolute-zero check applies only to Kelvin output (not input or other units); NaN/Inf handling; round-trip precision after rounding.
3. Explicit NaN/Inf validation vs. letting them propagate.
4. Sub-absolute-zero inputs in C/F; non-Kelvin outputs that should be invalid; float edge cases (Inf/NaN propagation, precision).
